description: Obsidian MCP server: semantic search, knowledge graph, and vault editing. No plugin required.
name: io.github.sweir1/obsidian-brain

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault (or any folder of .md files).
environmentVariables.name: VAULT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Where to store the SQLite index + embedding cache. Defaults to $XDG_DATA_HOME/obsidian-brain or ~/.local/share/obsidian-brain.
environmentVariables.name: DATA_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Preset name: english (default, bge-small-en-v1.5), fastest, balanced, multilingual. Ignored when EMBEDDING_MODEL is set.
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_PRESET

environmentVariables.description: Power-user override: any transformers.js checkpoint or Ollama model id. Takes precedence over EMBEDDING_PRESET. Switching auto-reindexes.
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Embedding backend. 'transformers' (local, default) or 'ollama' (requires a running Ollama server).
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of a local Ollama server. Only used when EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=ollama.
environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Override the embedding dimensionality when EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=ollama. If unset, the server probes the model on startup.
environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_EMBEDDING_DIM
